src: <url to the .zip file created by the release script>
name: Computer Vision
long: Classic computer-vision processes for ossia score: image filters and analyses as ISF/CSF shaders, plus CPU objects (connected components, contours, blob stats, optical flow, homography, Kalman, FAST corners) built only on Eigen/xtensor/xsimd/Boost.Geometry. DNN models live in score-addon-onnx.
